root.m_Talk_ENG: The testing area is being attacked?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The testing area is being attacked?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The testing area is being attacked?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Acknowledged! Sending help right away
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Acknowledged! Sending help right away
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am? Why did you cut the comms off...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am? Why did you cut the comms off...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am? Why did you cut the comms off...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have to protect the frontlines. Isn't it your top priority to help me secure the Artifact?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have to protect the frontlines. Isn't it your top priority to help me secure the Artifact?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have to protect the frontlines. Isn't it your top priority to help me secure the Artifact?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You wouldn't want to be disgraced for neglecting the Minister of Defense's orders while trying to defend the Chief of the General Staff's troublesome testing base, would you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You wouldn't want to be disgraced for neglecting the Minister of Defense's orders while trying to defend the Chief of the General Staff's troublesome testing base, would you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You wouldn't want to be disgraced for neglecting the Minister of Defense's orders while trying to defend the Chief of the General Staff's troublesome testing base, would you?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If you say so
8v

If you say so
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If you say so
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. The Administration's people will be taken care of first.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. The Administration's people will be taken care of first.
